zh.lifeSummary: 當Fulk FitzWarin 2nd Baron FitzWarin於1280年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾廷頓時，他的父親Fulk FitzWarin 1st Baron FitzWarin29歲，母親Margaret de la Pole23歲。他於大約1292年與Eleanor de Beauchamp結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1336年在奧地利尼德洛斯特利希享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Fulk FitzWarin 2nd Baron FitzWarin于1280年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾廷頓时，他的父亲Fulk FitzWarin 1st Baron FitzWarin29岁，母亲Margaret de la Pole23岁。他于大约1292年与Eleanor de Beauchamp结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1336年在奥地利尼德洛斯特利希享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fulk
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. The name was originally a short form of various compound names containing the word volk ‘people, tribe’ (compare modern English folk). It has gradually died out of general use, but is still used in certain families, in particular the Grevilles. Fulke Greville, 1st Baron Brooke, was a leading figure at the court of Elizabeth I. See also Greville .

variants.name: Fulke
meanings: Of Germanic origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. The name was originally a short form of various compound names containing the word volk ‘people, tribe’ (compare modern English folk). It has gradually died out of general use, but is still used in certain families, in particular the Grevilles. Fulke Greville, 1st Baron Brooke, was a leading figure at the court of Elizabeth I. See also Greville .

en.lifeSummary: When Fulk FitzWarin 2nd Baron FitzWarin was born in 1280, in Whittington, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Fulk FitzWarin 1st Baron FitzWarin, was 29 and his mother, Margaret de la Pole, was 23. He married Eleanor de Beauchamp about 1292. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1336, in Lower Austria, Austria, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Fulk FitzWarin 2nd Baron FitzWarin est né en 1280, à Whittington, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Fulk FitzWarin 1st Baron FitzWarin, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Margaret de la Pole, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor de Beauchamp environ 1292. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1336, à Niederösterreich, Autriche, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Fulk FitzWarin 2nd Baron FitzWarin 1280 in Whittington, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Fulk FitzWarin 1st Baron FitzWarin 29 und seine Mutter Margaret de la Pole 23. Er hat um 1292 Eleanor de Beauchamp geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1336 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Niederösterreich, Österreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Fulk FitzWarin 2nd Baron FitzWarin è nato il nel 1280 nel Whittington, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Fulk FitzWarin 1st Baron FitzWarin, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de la Pole, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor de Beauchamp circa 1292. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1336, nel Niederösterreich, Austria, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Fulk FitzWarin 2nd Baron FitzWarinが1280年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアウィッティントンで生まれた時，父Fulk FitzWarin 1st Baron FitzWarinは29歳，母Margaret de la Poleは23歳であった。約1292年にEleanor de Beauchampと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1336年にオーストリアニーデルoステレイチで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Fulk FitzWarin 2nd Baron FitzWarin(이)가 1280년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 휘틴그턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Fulk FitzWarin 1st Baron FitzWarin(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de la Pole(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1292년 Eleanor de Beauchamp(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1336년 오스트리아 니더o스터레이치에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Fulk FitzWarin 2nd Baron FitzWarin nasceu em 1280, em Whittington, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Fulk FitzWarin 1st Baron FitzWarin, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de la Pole, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor de Beauchamp aproximadamente 1292. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1336, em Niederösterreich, Áustria, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Fulk FitzWarin 2nd Baron FitzWarin родился в 1280 г. в местности уиттингтон, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Fulk FitzWarin 1st Baron FitzWarin было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de la Pole, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor de Beauchamp около 1292 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1336 г. в местности ниедирoстирраич, Австрия в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Fulk FitzWarin 2nd Baron FitzWarin nació en 1280, en Whittington, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Fulk FitzWarin 1st Baron FitzWarin, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Margaret de la Pole, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Eleanor de Beauchamp aproximadamente 1292. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1336, en Niederösterreich, Austria, a la edad de 56 años.
